rels.sql: SELECT l.l_shipmode, l.l_receiptdate, CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' OR o.o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS high_line_count, CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' AND o.o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS low_line_count FROM orders o, lineitem l WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey AND l.l_commitdate < l.l_receiptdate AND l.l_shipdate < l.l_commitdate ORDER BY l.l_shipmode
